message:
feat(vdbe): implement 20+ new VDBE opcodes, UNIQUE index codegen, collation-aware comparison, and type affinity

Major expansion of the VDBE engine and code generator to close conformance
gaps and support UNIQUE constraints, collation, and many previously stubbed
opcodes.

VDBE engine (engine.rs):
- Implement RowSet operations (RowSetAdd/RowSetRead/RowSetTest) for
  OR-optimized queries and IN subqueries using a sorted, deduplicated
  i64 set with binary search.
- Implement FK counter opcodes (FkCounter/FkIfZero) for deferred
  foreign key enforcement.
- Implement MemMax, OffsetLimit, IfNotZero for query limit handling.
- Implement Pagecount, MaxPgcnt, JournalMode, IntegrityCk, Vacuum,
  IncrVacuum, Expire for PRAGMA and maintenance commands.
- Implement CursorLock/CursorUnlock, ClrSubtype/GetSubtype/SetSubtype,
  FilterAdd/Filter (Bloom filter stubs), CursorHint/Trace/Abortable/
  ReleaseReg as no-op advisory opcodes.
- Split Savepoint and Checkpoint into separate handlers with documentation.
- Split AggInverse and AggValue into separate handlers.
- Implement IdxLE/IdxGT/IdxLT/IdxGE with real column-by-column comparison
  (was stubbed as fall-through).
- Add collate_compare() for NOCASE/RTRIM/BINARY text collation in Eq/Ne/
  Lt/Le/Gt/Ge comparisons via P4::Collation.
- Wire IdxInsert P5=1 to index_insert_unique for UNIQUE index enforcement.
- Add RowSet struct, AUTOINCREMENT sequence map, and FK counter to engine
  state. Add MemDatabase::table_count() helper.
- Add comprehensive tests for all new opcodes.

VDBE codegen (codegen.rs):
- Add ColumnInfo.unique and IndexSchema.is_unique fields.
- Emit Opcode::Affinity before MakeRecord in both VALUES and SELECT
  insert paths to apply column type coercion before record packing.
- Pass oe_flag (conflict resolution) to INSERT...SELECT path.
- Wire emit_index_inserts for INSERT...SELECT (was missing).
- Encode UNIQUE index info in IdxInsert P3/P5/P4 operands.
- Add tests for INSERT...SELECT conflict propagation and index inserts.

Planner codegen:
- Add IndexSchema.is_unique to planner schema types.

Vectorized aggregation (vectorized_agg.rs):
- Fix NULL handling in build_group_key_column: non-text/non-blob keys in
  text/blob columns now correctly treated as NULL (were incorrectly marked
  valid, producing wrong grouping results).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
